chunks.text: Page | 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc Application No.D-20 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For orders on M.A No.10832/25. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2026. ***************************************** None present on behalf of the Applicant. Same was the case on last three dates of hearing i.e. 17.12.2025, 14.01.2026 and 10.02.2026. This is a fourth occasion this Application was listed for hearing and none are present before this Bench nor any intimation has been received. The matter challenging impugned order dated 29.03.2025 in relation to a Superdari Application which was rejected by the Additional Sessions Judge-I at Kotri. The impugned order well articulates the reasoning for such rejection and in our view does not require any interference. In view of above, this Cr. Misc Application is dismissed alongwith pending application(s) for above reasons apart from the fact that the applicant has lost interest and is no longer interested in prosecution of the same. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
